consequences: Future sessions should claim task-006, not task-004, when doing the final publish-readiness review.
context: An initial publish-readiness task was created with placeholder dependency ids. The hub rejected a direct transition from ready to blocked, so the stale task needs an explicit supersession record.
decision: Treat task-006 as the canonical publish-readiness task for the post. Task-004 exists only as a superseded stub and should not be claimed for work.
title: Canonical publish-readiness task is task-006
